overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA San Andreas showing the character CJ walking through an urban coastal area at sunset. The character transitions from a city street with roadside restaurants and traffic to a beach promenade lined with palm trees overlooking the ocean, then turns back toward the city as evening approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with roadside restaurant seating

events.description: character begins walking along the sidewalk from a standing position
white sedan and dark vehicles pass by on the road parallel to the character

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a black metal fence, passing outdoor restaurant seating with green umbrellas

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving along the road in the same direction as the character

entered.detail: outdoor dining area with green umbrellas and white tables
low black metal fence separating sidewalk from street
large decorative arch bridge structure visible in the distance
tall palm trees lining the urban street

segments.scene_description: The character stands near a roadside restaurant with green umbrellas before beginning to walk along an urban sidewalk. A black metal fence separates the walkway from the street where vehicles pass by. In the distance, a distinctive arched bridge structure is visible against the evening sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from commercial street to beach promenade under overpass

events.description: passing the Pay N Spray auto shop building on the left
walking under the concrete overpass and emerging toward the beachfront

agents.ego_description: walking past the Pay N Spray building and proceeding under the highway overpass toward the open beach area

entered.detail: multi-story commercial building with Pay N Spray signage
elevated highway structure casting shadows over the walkway
open paved area leading to the beachfront

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the Pay N Spray auto shop and walks under a concrete overpass, transitioning from the enclosed urban street to the more open beach promenade. The palm trees become more prominent as the ocean comes into view in the distance.

events.description: sun setting over the ocean creates deep orange and pink hues across the sky
character slows to a leisurely walk while observing the beach and ocean

agents.ego_description: strolling along the beachfront promenade with the ocean to the right, passing other pedestrians enjoying the sunset

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking along the beach path in the opposite direction

entered.detail: calm ocean visible at sunset with orange reflection on the surface
large sun low on the horizon creating golden orange sky
small lifeguard station on the sandy beach

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto the wide-open beach promenade lined with palm trees. The setting sun casts a warm golden-orange glow over the ocean to the right, where a lifeguard tower stands on the sand. Other pedestrians stroll along the path as the character walks toward the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront transitioning back to urban area at twilight

events.description: character turns around 180 degrees to face back toward the city
street lights and building lights become visible as dusk settles and night approaches

agents.ego_description: turning around on the promenade and walking back toward the city buildings while looking up at the twilight sky

entered.detail: urban apartment buildings and commercial structures visible as character turns back
illuminated Sprunk advertisement billboard on building roof

segments.scene_description: The character turns around to head back toward the city, revealing the urban skyline against the deepening twilight. A lit Sprunk billboard glows atop one of the buildings as street lights begin to illuminate the scene. The palm trees now line the right side as the character leaves the beach behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling urban street that gradually opens into a sunlit beach promenade before turning back toward a twilight city skyline. It begins on a sidewalk near a roadside restaurant with green umbrellas, moving past a black metal fence and toward a distant arched bridge. As the character passes a Pay N Spray auto shop and walks under a concrete overpass, the enclosed city environment shifts into an open coastal landscape where palm trees and the ocean emerge. The scene then expands onto a wide promenade bathed in a warm golden-orange sunset, passing a lifeguard tower and other pedestrians along the water's edge. Finally, the camera turns away from the ocean to head back toward the city, where the lighting deepens into twilight and a glowing Sprunk billboard illuminates the urban skyline.
